/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=thread -g -g -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.5.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_model.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_sampler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_engine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_scheduler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_speculative.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_prompt_lookup.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_form_draft.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_prefix_cache.cpp.o CMakeFiles/sovrano_tests.dir/unit/test_corpus_index.cpp.o -o sovrano_tests  -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/Progetti Sviluppo/IA/Sovrano/build-tsan/_deps/catch2-build/src" -Wl,-rpath,"/Volumes/Progetti Sviluppo/IA/Sovrano/build-tsan/bin" ../src/libsovrano_core.a ../src/libsovrano_utils.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.3.5.4.dylib /opt/homebrew/opt/zstd/lib/libzstd.dylib ../bin/libllama.0.0.1.dylib ../bin/libggml.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-cpu.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-blas.0.15.3.dylib ../bin/libggml-base.0.15.3.dylib ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.3.5.4.dylib
